_comment: Sovereign macro indicators shown on the dashboard. The numeric annual figures below are fetched from the IMF World Economic Outlook (WEO) DataMapper — a free, no-key API — once per indicator across ALL countries per run. Slow-moving items that have no reliable free feed (central-bank policy rate, credit rating, 10y bond yield, quarterly GDP) live in config/countries.json and are maintained by hand. Edit either file; the fetch script reads both every run, no code changes needed.
